_publications._publicationTitle: Development of CAR-T cell therapy for NF1/SWN-related nerve sheath tumor treatment.

_contextSnippet: After confirming the expression of HER1 on sNF96.2 (Fig. 2 A), we assessed the tumor-lysing capabilities of 806, E2 and NEC.
details: Expressed HER1 antigen, confirmed by flow cytometry analysis
